title: Tao Te Ching 23
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 23 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 23 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Nature says few words. A whirlwind does not last all morning. A rainstorm does not last all day.
